_meta.description: Maps task types to recommended gstack skills. Updated by route-learn when skill outcome data is available.
_meta.policy: advisory — skills are shown as hints, never auto-invoked

debugging.description: Systematic root-cause analysis: 5-phase methodology (observe → hypothesis → test → fix → verify)
debugging.when_to_use: Error with unknown root cause, multi-file failures, intermittent bugs

security.description: OWASP Top 10 + STRIDE threat model audit by Chief Security Officer persona
security.when_to_use: Before shipping, after adding auth/inputs/external calls, security review requests

analysis.description: Automated bug detection, production-risk flagging, auto-fix of obvious issues
analysis.when_to_use: Pre-commit review, code quality audit, logic bug hunting

planning.description: YC-style interrogation of goal framing before building: 10-star product challenge
planning.when_to_use: Starting a new goal, validating product direction, before goal-plan runs

system_design.description: Architecture lock-in session: interfaces, scope, dependencies, risks
system_design.when_to_use: Before coding a new subsystem, reviewing existing architecture

code_edit.when_to_use: After implementing a feature or fix, before committing

orchestration.description: High-level product/strategy challenge before orchestrating a complex workflow
orchestration.when_to_use: When orchestrating multi-step workflows with unclear requirements

documentation.description: Review docs for accuracy and completeness

imessage_reply.description: Review outbound iMessage drafts for tone, appropriateness, and safety before send
imessage_reply.when_to_use: Before sending any iMessage — check tone, recipient, no sensitive info leaked

email_reply.description: Review outbound email drafts for tone, format, and safety
email_reply.when_to_use: Before sending any email draft — check professionalism, accuracy, recipient

comms_triage.description: Challenge and frame communications workflow before building triage system
comms_triage.when_to_use: When designing a comms triage workflow or inbox management strategy

outbound_review.description: Security-focused review of outbound comms — data leakage, privacy, recipient validation
outbound_review.when_to_use: Any security or privacy concern about outbound messages or email
